description_long: This rifle features a robust, dark metallic body with a prominent cylindrical barrel and a mounted scope on top, suggesting it is designed for precision shooting. The stock is made of wood, displaying a classic, ergonomic shape with a thumbhole for improved grip and control. The trigger guard and trigger are clearly visible, and the receiver area is detailed with mechanical components. The barrel is relatively thick and ends with a simple muzzle, lacking any complex attachments. The scope is tubular and mounted securely, indicating the rifle is intended for ranged accuracy. The overall design blends traditional and tactical elements, making it suitable for both display and practical use in urban environments.
description: A dark metallic rifle with a wooden thumbhole stock and a mounted scope, featuring a thick barrel and classic-meets-tactical design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the wooden thumbhole stock, metallic receiver, mounted scope, and thick barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening, scope alignment, and compact width.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, scope, and mechanical details of the receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's shape and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
